untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'pending news event identification' and 'days until economic event' which are external calendar/news data sources not available in the technical indicator list. The core rule depends on macro event timing (3-7 days before news) and fundamental analysis alignment, neither of which can be expressed using only price/volume/technical indicators. Technical confirmation conditions were approximated using moving average crossover and RSI momentum as proxies for directional bias, but the news-anticipation timing premium is not translatable to indicator-based rules.
translation_notes: This signal fundamentally requires integration with an economic calendar and news event database. The entry/exit conditions provided are a simplified technical approximation that cannot capture the intended 'pending news premium' logic. Backtesting this signal would require: (1) external news event data with timestamps, (2) custom event-timing logic outside standard indicator framework, and (3) fundamental analysis scoring system. Parameters (days_before_event_min: 3, days_before_event_max: 7, position_size_multiplier: 0.5) cannot be operationalized without news event timestamps.
